name: Benzel
strap: A mobile-first comic reader for The Night the Fun Went Missing.
summary: Benzel is a public web comic reader built around the feel of a dark carnival storybook: full-screen mobile pages, swipe navigation, thumbnails, and a bending page-turn motion.
desc: A full-screen comic book reader for a moonlit carnival mystery.

name: Sprocket
strap: A calm phone helper for reminders, tech help, memory, and confusing messages.
summary: Sprocket is a plain-language phone helper for everyday support: ask by voice or text, set reminders, remember details, get step-by-step phone help, and make sense of confusing letters, emails, or texts.
desc: Voice and text support for reminders, memory, phone help, read-aloud replies, and plain-English explanations.

name: Unload
strap: A calmer way to get things out of your head and move forward.
summary: Unload is a calm, voice-first app for the moment before clarity. It helps you set things down when you’re overloaded, name what would make today easier, and feel lighter without pressure, streaks, or integrations. Relief comes first; momentum can wait.
desc: A voice-first way to set things down and feel lighter.

name: ADHD Acclaim
strap: Small wins. Visible progress. Rewards without pressure.
summary: ADHD Acclaim is a motivation app designed for neurodiverse users. Instead of rigid planners or streak systems, it focuses on autonomy: users define their own tasks (“Wins”) and collect points toward self-chosen rewards. With an achievement-first design, the app reinforces visible progress, keeps pressure low, and celebrates each step forward—simple, supportive, and sustainable.
desc: Gamified rewards to celebrate wins and encourage progress.

name: Tou.me
strap: A calmer shared space for separated families.
summary: Tou.me is a shared-care organiser for families and support circles. It simplifies coordination between parents, relatives, and carers with lightweight scheduling and clear roles. Built to reduce friction and keep everyone on the same page, Tou.me helps households focus more on connection, less on admin.
desc: For you, for me, for them.

name: Dialled MTB
strap: Setup, maintenance, and support for riders who want things right.
summary: Dialled MTB is a maintenance and setup app for mountain bikers, combining passive Strava ride sync, structured service tracking, setup calculations, and contextual AI support.
desc: Maintenance tracking, setup guidance, and AI support for MTB riders.

name: Mandrake
summary: Mandrake helps you self-manage urges with awareness and choice, turning each one into practice instead of pressure. With a breath and a move, you redirect the pull and record it in seconds, building a repertoire that strengthens your form. Over time, the shadow stops being just a test — it becomes the trainer that sharpens your rhythm and restores your balance.
desc: Private urge logging, quick tactics, and pattern insights.

name: SyncFit
summary: SyncFit makes fitness planning practical by working around real calendars. The app finds free time slots in Google Calendar, recommends sessions based on goals, and lets users log or adjust workouts on the fly. No wasted plans, no guilt—just exercise that slots into daily life and sticks.
desc: Smart scheduling for workouts and self-care, synced with your calendar.

name: Assume Zero
summary: AssumeZero teaches children to question what they're shown — AI fakes, clickbait, engineered feelings — using inoculation, a proven method, delivered in a swipe-feed they actually want to play. v0.3 core loop is built and playtested.
desc: A playtested v0.3 prototype: the TruthNet swipe-feed core loop — spot, reveal, repeat — plus Creator Mode and a Key-Stage spine from provenance to feeling.

name: Apex State
strap: telemetry, sessions and setup — for riders who actually ride.
summary: Apex State is a track-day setup companion for motorcyclists who want structure over guesswork. Log tyre pressures, session notes, and suspension settings—then compare them across events to find what's actually fast.
desc: Track-day telemetry, session logging, and setup tools — built for the paddock.

name: Rehab Path
summary: RehabPath is a structured recovery companion for people working through injury rehab. It provides clear, phase-based programmes, step-by-step exercise guidance, and visible progress tracking—all stored privately on your device. No accounts, no tracking, no complexity. Just a calm, focused tool to help you stay on course and see your improvement.
desc: Structured rehab programmes, simple exercise guidance, and private progress tracking.

name: Heart of Living Yoga
strap: Daily heart-centred practice, live meditations, and community.
summary: Heart of Living Yoga brings guided practices, live daily meditations, teachings, retreats, and ways to support the charity together in one calm place — a living teaching space rather than just another meditation library. Free practices to begin with, live morning and evening meditations, and a growing library of classes and music.
desc: Guided practices, live daily meditations, classes, music, and events for a heart-centred community.

name: Sidestand
strap: The maintenance log and ride record for adventure riders.
summary: Sidestand is a maintenance and ride-log app for adventure and touring motorcyclists - per-component service intervals keyed to the odometer, trips, a stops map, a documents wallet, and a service history export that adds real money at resale.
desc: Maintenance tracking, ride logging, and trips for ADV riders.
